name: List
author: Martin Macak
description: Dynamic data table for the array data source — the first of its kind in HexaOS. Bind any number of datapoints into one input and the widget renders one row per datapoint: icon, name and live value. Each row's icon, colour and label is set per-row in Bindings (reorderable); density, dividers, zebra, icon/name/value sizes and colours, value weight, decimals, unit and an optional header row are global options. No auto or random icons or colours — every visual aspect is user-configured.
